source_refs: Project evidence: homepage Services section background image role
business_goal: Support the Services section with a low-distraction industrial background that strengthens credibility without overpowering copy
visual_message: A restrained industrial geometry backdrop that feels real, technical, and compatible with a dense multi-column services layout
iteration_hypothesis: A lower-contrast industrial background with controlled geometry will preserve readability better than a literal busy switchboard photo

technical_signals.aperture: f/4 to f/5.6 for readable depth without busy blur
technical_signals.light_source: controlled industrial ambient light with restrained highlight accents
technical_signals.motion_rule: still environment with no human action as focal subject

spatial_positioning: industrial panel or systems geometry sits behind the service columns
contrast stays low enough for eight service items to remain readable
large foreground objects do not interrupt text zones
background rhythm supports structure without becoming a hero focal point
visual_standard: restrained corporate industrial photography for web background use
color_restriction: charcoal, muted steel, matte grey, soft amber or cyan control accents only; avoid saturated neon or harsh color shifts
material_notes: subtle glass or acrylic indicator covers
controlled highlights without glossy AI sheen
reality_anchor: credible industrial panel or systems surface

composition_rule.hero_safe_area: preserve broad readable zones for the Services heading and multi-column content
composition_rule.focal_structure: no dominant hero focal point; background should support content hierarchy
composition_rule.camera: industrial interior photography with stable perspective

lighting_rule.contrast: low to moderate for background usability
lighting_rule.surface_behavior: controlled highlights and believable industrial texture

disallowed_ai_signals: busy action scene with operators dominating the frame
